title: Patient Perspective on Chemotherapy-Induced Peripheral Neuropathy (CIPN) in Advanced-Stage Classic Hodgkin Lymphoma Treated With Multiagent Chemotherapy Regimens in the HD21 Trial.
abstract: Patient-reported outcome (PRO) data were analyzed to explore the experience of chemotherapy-induced peripheral neuropathy (CIPN) symptoms by patients with newly-diagnosed advanced-stage classic Hodgkin lymphoma (AS-cHL) treated with BrECADD versus eBEACOPP, and explore the association of CIPN symptoms with health-related quality of life (HRQoL).
